pi_items.source: User-created meeting name, verified in task description but unverifiable until runtime
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 18 and export_result.sh line 9

Docker Compose naming convention: project 'jitsi' (from /home/ga/jitsi directory) + service 'jicofo' + instance '1'. No explicit container_name set in docker-compose.yml, so auto-generated with underscores not hyphens.
Meeting room name, appears in logs when conference is created. Confirmed in export_result.sh grep patterns.

Jicofo logs contain 'Created new focus' messages when conferences are created. Verified from GitHub Jicofo repository issues and examples showing log format like 'Created new focus for [room]@[domain]'.

Jicofo allocates conference focus when a meeting is created. Term 'allocated' is standard in conference management terminology and consistent with Jicofo's role as focus allocator. Verified through task description and Jicofo architecture documentation.

Jicofo is a Focus component and its logs are emitted by FocusManager class (org.jitsi.jicofo.FocusManager). Verified in Jicofo source code references and logging properties (lib/logging.properties in jicofo repository).
Confirmed to exist on Docker Hub with tag stable-9753. Release page exists at github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/releases/tag/stable-9753

Confirmed to exist on Docker Hub with tag stable-9753. Jicofo is a real Jitsi Meet component for conference focus management. Release page exists at github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/releases/tag/stable-9753
Confirmed to exist on Docker Hub with tag stable-9753. Prosody is the XMPP server used by Jitsi Meet. Release page exists at github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/releases/tag/stable-9753

Confirmed to exist on Docker Hub with tag stable-9753. JVB (Jitsi Video Bridge) is the SFU (Selective Forwarding Unit) component. Release page exists at github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/releases/tag/stable-9753

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real Jitsi Meet software (open-source video conferencing system) deployed via Docker with verified images jitsi/web, jitsi/jicofo, jitsi/prosody, and jitsi/jvb all at tag stable-9753. Jicofo is a real conference focus component that manages media sessions and creates log entries containing 'FocusManager', 'created', and 'allocated' keywords when conferences are established. The task generates synthetic data by having an agent join a meeting named 'MergerDiscussion' and extract a log line from the jicofo container to /home/ga/merger_audit_log.txt. The actual container name will be 'jitsi_jicofo_1' (not 'jitsi-jicofo' as claimed in metadata), but this does not affect task execution since the export script dynamically locates it.
